title: Autofill QUICK SEARCH

posts.author: jonasf (Jonas Fürstenberg)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I search for something and there is no result , and then I want to perform a a quick search action.
As a user it makes sense that I will obvsiouly search for the same thing again.
Thus if you could build a feature, where the quicksearch is automatically searching what I previously just searched for, this would be a great useful feature.

Thanks!
